title: More Composter Variants
description: Composters for every kind of wood
body:
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/mod-titles/more-composter-variants.png) --- [![](https://assets.lieonstudios.dev/common/badges/label/lieon-studios-creation.svg)](https://modrinth.com/organization/lieonstudios) [![](https://assets.lieonstudios.dev/common/badges/label/requires/quad.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad) Community: [![discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/discord.svg)](https://discord.lieonlion.dev/) Source: [![github](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/github.svg)](https://github.com/pnk2u/More-Composter-Variants) pnku: [![pnku.de](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/icon/pnku_de_logo.svg)](https://www.pnku.de) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/modrinth.svg)](https://modrinth.com/user/pnku) [![curseforge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/curseforge.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/pnku/) ![](https://assets.lieonstudios.dev/common/dividers/horizontal/pnku-top.svg) ## More Composter Variants Fill your builds with colourful organic recycling as now each wood type has its own composter. ![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/1st6r.gif) ### Adding 12 new _Composters_ to Minecraft. #### These composters can also be crafted using [Nemo's Woodcutter](https://modrinth.com/mod/nemos-woodcutter).
How can I craft vanilla Composters using modded wood types from Biomes o' Plenty, [Let's Do] mods, and others? Unfortunately, the vanilla Composter crafting recipe has to be overridden for the crafting of the variants to function.

But usually these mods add their wood types to the Vanilla recipe, which creates a conflict. Fortunately, there is also a fairly easy way around this issue.

That is what the "More Compatibility Variants" are for:
These datapacks/mods resolve this issue across all of our "More X Variants" mods, so you can craft composters and other vanilla items/blocks just as you would expect.
 
Currently available **_More Compatibility Variants_**:
 - [Biomes o' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-bop)
 - [[Let's Do] Meadow, (Nether)Vinery, Beachparty and Blooming Nature](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-lets-do)
 - [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-ns)
 - [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-otbwg)
Would you like to see support for another mod with custom wood types? Let me know via [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/sA42pp6cuX), [GitHub](https://github.com/pnk2u), or [E-Mail](mailto:pnku@pnku.de)!
--- ##  [![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/ongzm.gif) Pale Oak textures by **_hunnycakehorse_**](https://modrinth.com/user/hunnycakehorse)
  ## Compatible with [Quad](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad) 1.3.0+'s block replacement: ![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/c8j6v.webp) Looking at a Farmer villager of a Savanna Village: We can see that instead of regular _Composter_ and _Oak Torches_, the game now generates the village with an _**Acacia Composter**_ and _**Acacia Torches**_ (from [More Torch Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-torch-variants)). ![](https://assets.lieonstudios.dev/common/dividers/horizontal/pnku-bottom.svg) [**![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/8jurh.gif)**]()
